recentTweets.text:
The @MnPCA has issued hazardous air quality alerts across the state. Heavy smoke is expected to linger throughout the day, with tomorrow’s air quality ranging from moderate to unhealthy in some areas. Learn more ⬇️
 https://t.co/4rNU9EkGV8

Today, the so-called Take Care of America’s Veterans Act will be brought to the House floor. I will stand with veteran organizations and vote no against this bill. This bill cuts critical care and benefits for those who have sacrificed through service answering the nation's call. https://t.co/4veFXRzCds
Republicans are planning to spend billions more taxpayer money for the unlawful Iran war while leaving less money for Americans whoare struggling at home. https://t.co/jgvBwoiTel

Wildfires in Canada and the Boundary Waters are bringing dangerous air across Minnesota. Pay attention to air quality alerts. These are dangerous conditions for everyone, and especially to sensitive groups.
https://t.co/NPgp6P43Lk

Republicans are rushing poorly drafted legislation on daylight savings time, something no one in Minnesota has called my office about. What Americans actually want is for Congress to work to lower the cost of living and end Trump’s unlawful war in Iran.

Last year, RFK Jr cut the CDC’s monitoring requirements for food borne diseases. Now, cyclosporiasis, one of the pathogens removed from CDC tracking, is spreading across the country, and we don’t have the data we need.
https://t.co/rHGi3piH6a

Yet again, President Donald Trump has put Native American sacred sites and some of our nation's most iconic places in the crosshairs of corporations who want to drill and mine on America's public lands. It’s not just wrong—it’s illegal. https://t.co/7cCvZYwgLX

President Trump's disastrous war in Iran is only getting worse. The ceasefire has disintegrated, plunging the entire region into chaos. Now, Trump wants to levy a 20% tax on every ship that goes through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump got us in this mess. It's time to get us out.

A full and transparent investigation is needed into the fatal shooting of a 26-year-old by ICE this morning in Maine – the second fatality at the hands of federal agents in a week. Federal immigration agents must be held accountable for their use of deadly force.

The U.S. Forest Service will close the Boundary Waters effective tonight through Friday due to extreme heat and elevated wildfire danger. This important precautionary measure is intended to protect both the wilderness and its visitors. https://t.co/Kzgm75fXOP
RT @GovTimWalz: I’ve declared a peacetime emergency and mobilized the National Guard to assist with wildfire response in northern Minnesota…

The Great Minnesota Get-Together is almost here! Minnesotans and visitors from all around the country are in for some treats as 36 new fair foods and nine new vendors make their debut on August 27th through Labor Day. https://t.co/6ab9NBHQlu

I offer my sincere condolences to Senator Graham’s family, his colleagues, and his many friends. Though Senator Graham and I sat on different sides of the aisle, we found common ground in our shared commitment to our Ukrainian allies and their fight to defend their sovereignty

Congratulations to Air Force Master Sgt. Elizabeth Mahmood on being selected as one of the Minnesota National Guard’s 2026 Outstanding Airmen of the Year. Thank you for your bravery, service, and commitment to serving others. 
https://t.co/yfkwmq0KiB
The First Amendment protects journalists’ right to pursue the truth — even if the truth upsets the president. Trump’s attacks on journalists are unacceptable. https://t.co/V1c3GYIQrH

4x WNBA Champion. WNBA Hall of Fame inductee. WNBA record for playoff wins. And now: WNBA record for regular season wins.

Congratulations, Cheryl Reeve! You make @MinnesotaLynx fans proud. https://t.co/9M8ce7j1LC

The Israeli government must immediately release the 84 Palestinian health care workers illegally held in Israeli jails, including Dr. Abu Safiya, a pediatrician reportedly near death after months of torture and starvation. This inhumane treatment must stop.https://t.co/SU87R6w0Aq

The American people did not vote for the war in Iran. Congress did not authorize the war in Iran.

The only way for President Trump to end the mess he created in the Middle East is for him to return to the ceasefire and negotiate a long-term regional peace agreement.

Minnesota's election system is a national model. It's safe, secure, and fair, as demonstrated by our nation-leading voter turnout. President Trump's attacks over our refusal to surrender voter data puts our democracy at risk. https://t.co/5jvLuJu9HP

My thoughts are with the family and friends of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo following the fatal shooting earlier this week.

DHS and ICE cannot be trusted to investigate themselves. There must be a comprehensive, transparent, and independent investigation into what happened.

We don’t allow mining in Yellowstone.

We don’t allow mining in Glacier.

We don’t allow mining in Yosemite.

We don’t allow mining in Zion.

We don't allow mining in Acadia.

We don't allow mining in Grand Teton.

We shouldn’t allow mining in the Boundary Waters.

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
